mapper.insert: INSERT INTO spots ( content_id, title, addr1, addr2, first_image, first_image2, mapx, mapy, area_code, sigungu_code, content_type_id ) VALUES ( #{contentId}, #{title}, #{addr1}, #{addr2}, #{firstImage}, #{firstImage2}, #{mapx}, #{mapy}, #{areaCode}, #{sigunguCode}, #{contentTypeId} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title = VALUES(title), addr1 = VALUES(addr1), addr2 = VALUES(addr2), first_image = VALUES(first_image), first_image2 = VALUES(first_image2), mapx = VALUES(mapx), mapy = VALUES(mapy), area_code = VALUES(area_code), sigungu_code = VALUES(sigungu_code), content_type_id = VALUES(content_type_id)
